strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms
Proven fullstack range from databases to UI, including AWS and Kubernetes exposure
Track record of clean architecture, TDD, and CI/CD practices
concerns: Seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior background applying to an entry-level role
Limited PostgreSQL evidence (primarily MongoDB in recent roles)
Berlin-based candidate for a role requiring high on-site presence (location unspecified)

key_factors.factor: Cloud and AI tooling exposure aligns with nice-to-haves

response.justification: The candidate vastly exceeds the technical bar for this junior/mid-level role, with deep fullstack TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, and Kubernetes experience plus clean-architecture discipline. The primary fit question is seniority alignment and retention risk at an entry-level position, along with lighter PostgreSQL exposure relative to MongoDB. Technically well-matched; level and on-site logistics are the open questions.
